summary: TelemetryState is Breach. Budget Recovery Protocol activates. New high-risk chains are blocked. Only low-risk stabilizers (Фиксация, Пауза/Hold, Очистка) are permitted. Domain actions above 50% RiskWeight are frozen.
claim_attempt: With TelemetryState=Breach, Budget Recovery activates: only stabilizers (Фиксация 20%, Пауза/Hold 10%, Очистка 15%) are permitted. High-risk chains blocked.
